title: The Bible, Theology, and the Christ Figures in Film Session 2: Jesus Films Part 1 continued
author: Lewis, David
description: Dr. Lewis discusses the movies : "The Passion of Christ" and "Jesus of Nazareth" and how they depict Jesus and follow the biblical narrative.
